Propagation Caro... has a lot going on, but the big pain points are that it doubles the amount of embryo fusion you need before you get an embryo and removes the shield/STR you get from triggering Devour
Saya is *generally* more than making up for the loss in STR on Devour just from Corrosion alone
Also the furnace change
Furnace is whatever
usually takes an entire combat for the furnace to refill to any usable amount to begin with
only Salvador and a bare few relics could realistically put anything in there worth using, and Salvador can still use the furnace productively with his cards

Losing the shields on Devour absolutely fucking sucks, though. Other problem is, Propagation Caro changes the bonus on actually using an embryo from crit to exalt final damage, and not a lot of Caro units can use that... but that's just bad for Caro units, there are several other units that work just fine otherwise.
I think Saya's still good for some kind of Salvador/Saya/Sanga comp

Saya has negative synergy with GHelot (Arguably... people have argued about it... the flails don't *disappear* when Saya discards them, they'll pop up again later) and Pontos (Corrosion steals his kills, but he can still just kill)
problem is there's nobody in your box to replace it *with*
it doesn't matter that they pop up again later, it'll delay preparation
The gimmick is, you throw a bunch of them into your draw pile and continue preparing
then, you throw out a few flails, 0 cost, and draw more flails -- theoretically more than you could have held at one time anyway
the problem with that is that you need to mass produce Bloodthirsty Flail, keep them in the deck floating around, and still somehow actually get them when you need them using *just* Saya's 0 cost
with lv1 Aurita, Faros, and Lotan, I can't really offer an alternative team that just happens to have Saya in it, either
